runners.formComment: Won two starts back over 485m at Horsham. Last start he finished 3rd over 525m at The Meadows beaten 1.75 lengths (30.16) behind Red Day in a Grade 4/5 on April 11. Draw likely to suit. Forward showing expected.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 515m at this track behind Lindenow Buster beaten 6 lengths (29.88). Forward showing expected.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (29.70) over 515m at this track. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished fifth over 435m at Sale, beaten 5 lengths. Needs to find a bit more.

runners.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (30.37) at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 5 for the first time. Looking to others.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at The Meadows over 525m. Last start finished 5th in a Special conditions H on April 10 over 520m at Geelong behind Brother Doom beaten 9 lengths (30.74). Solid claims this line-up.

runners.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 520m at Wentworth Park on March 28. Well performed from this box. In the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the turn into the back straight and fell.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 460m in 25.91. Followed that up with a minor placing over 525m at The Meadows at Grade 4/5 two weeks ago. More than capable and has to be included.
